channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Streetlight 100/H18 on Chislehurst High St, BR7 is not working., 21st March
item.description:
Streetlight 100/H18 on Chislehurst High St, BR7 is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mature tree covered in ivy which seems to be affecting its growth, 21st March
item.description:
It's a bigger job that I could or should deal with
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramerton Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light flickering all night, 21st March
item.description:
Further to FixMyStreet reference 8457385, I note that a new light (No. 150) has been installed. Please replace/repair the light situated between #65-67. This light is currently illuminated during the day and flickers throughout the night. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Redwald Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christchurch Way with Derwent street needs more regular cleaning, 21st March
item.description:
The street is constantly dirty. Compared with other areas in the borough, this is one of the worst areas by far. This is constantly reported by neighbours in many facebook groups too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual pile of rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
This has been here for weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King and Queen Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 21st March
item.description:
Been there for several months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving, 21st March
item.description:
Uneven paving causing a dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conifer Gardens, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree in need of pruning ,, 21st March
item.description:
Tree in need of pruning , far to big and seems like a long time since it was done and when it leaf it over hangs the road . please can this be actioned.Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Uneven paving slab causing a dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-18, Ingram Close, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish emptied from a van. Last night?, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish emptied from a van
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murchison Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Dumped caravan, 21st March
item.description:
White old caravan blocking the cycling lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlebrook, Abbey Wood

item.title: Spilt recycling, soil and rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
As above Not related to work at 277

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 21st March
item.description:
Lught not working again it took over a year to get them working now it has gone again and you can't see the broken glass on the path without using a touch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bentham Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: J4E UD black mercedes illegally parked on double yellow lines EN3 6WJ, 21st March
item.description:
Black Mercedes registration: J4E UD illegally and dangerously parked on double yellow lines on Manton Road at the junction with Thorneycroft Drive, EN3 6WJ Enfield Island Village.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beginning of a long crack in new road surface, 21st March
item.description:
Developing problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overbury Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van dumped in Fenton Close, 21st March
item.description:
The van has been abandoned for months very close to the turning in to Broadheath Drive meaning you have to turn out from the Close from the wrong side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cow Path, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 5, 21st March
item.description:
Adult incontinant pads in two black bags Put there by carers who attend number 4 broad oak close br5 2tl

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broad Oak Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement behind Stamford Hill Overground, 21st March
item.description:
Top of Holmdale terrace has dumped rubbish all across pavement. Please clean.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmdale Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large piece of board on pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Flew off the back of a pick up .Your operator said they could not find it. It is between 66 and 68 Bromley Common at the place where the front walls join, on the pavement. Near the tree on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags dumped near post box, 21st March
item.description:
Bags dumped in Lulworth Road near post box & Field

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
